creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #1)

> According to the change log, no functional change, only tabs replaced by spaces.

> Does this really need a update of the port ?

YES!

Its not an update from 0.22 to 0.23. It is an update from 0.09 to 0.23. This are far more changes. Therefore the update is needed.
